title: Mexican Chicken Roast
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired roast chicken dish with a rustic twist.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Drizzle the chicken with olive oil and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
Roast the chicken for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before carving.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as Mexican rice, beans, or roasted vegetables.
